symbols.water: Emotions, subconscious mind, purification, life flow. Calm water = peace; turbulent = emotional turmoil
symbols.ocean: Vastness of the subconscious, feeling overwhelmed, infinite possibilities
symbols.river: Life's journey, passage of time, going with the flow or against it
symbols.flood: Overwhelmed by emotions, loss of control, major life changes
symbols.flying: Freedom, ambition, desire to escape limitations, spiritual elevation
symbols.falling: Loss of control, anxiety about failure, letting go, insecurity
symbols.teeth falling out: Anxiety about appearance, fear of aging, powerlessness, communication issues
symbols.being chased: Avoiding a problem, running from fears, feeling threatened
symbols.death: Transformation, ending of a phase, rebirth, major change (rarely literal)
symbols.snake: Transformation, hidden fears, wisdom, sexuality, healing (kundalini)
symbols.spider: Creativity, patience, feminine power, feeling trapped in a web
symbols.dog: Loyalty, friendship, protection, instinct, unconditional love
symbols.cat: Independence, intuition, femininity, mystery, hidden aspects of self
symbols.fish: Subconscious insights, abundance, fertility, emotions beneath surface
symbols.horse: Power, freedom, drive, natural instincts, nobility
symbols.house: The self, psyche, different rooms = different aspects of personality
symbols.window: Perspective, outlook on life, opportunities seen but not reached
symbols.stairs: Progress, ambition, ascending/descending in life, spiritual growth
symbols.bridge: Transition, connection, overcoming obstacles, decision point
symbols.road: Life path, journey, direction, choices ahead
symbols.forest: The unknown, subconscious, getting lost in thoughts, nature connection
symbols.cave: Hidden aspects of self, retreat, subconscious exploration
symbols.fire: Passion, anger, transformation, destruction and rebirth, energy
symbols.moon: Femininity, intuition, cycles, hidden emotions, mystery
symbols.stars: Hope, guidance, aspirations, destiny, spiritual connection
symbols.clouds: Confusion, daydreaming, obstacles to clarity, impermanence
symbols.storm: Emotional turbulence, conflict, dramatic change, power
symbols.mirror: Self-reflection, truth, identity, how others see you
symbols.clock: Time pressure, mortality, urgency, life phases
symbols.book: Knowledge, life story, memory, wisdom, learning
symbols.baby: New beginnings, innocence, vulnerability, creative projects
symbols.wedding: Commitment, union of aspects of self, partnership, transition
symbols.school: Learning, social anxiety, past experiences, personal growth
symbols.exam: Self-evaluation, fear of judgment, preparedness, performance anxiety
symbols.naked in public: Vulnerability, authenticity, fear of exposure, shame
symbols.lost: Confusion in life, losing direction, identity crisis, searching
symbols.late: Missing opportunities, anxiety, feeling unprepared, time pressure
symbols.prison: Feeling trapped, guilt, restriction, self-imposed limitations
symbols.money: Self-worth, power, security, values, life energy
symbols.garden: Personal growth, cultivation of self, inner paradise, fertility
symbols.tree: Life, growth, family (roots), stability, connection earth-sky
symbols.flower: Beauty, fragility, love, growth stages, impermanence
symbols.blood: Life force, passion, sacrifice, family ties, emotional pain
symbols.eye: Awareness, perception, truth, surveillance, wisdom (third eye)
symbols.heart: Love, emotions, core self, courage, vitality
symbols.angel: Protection, guidance, higher self, messages, purity
symbols.demon: Shadow self, fears, repressed desires, inner conflict
symbols.ghost: Past issues, unresolved emotions, memories, guilt
symbols.mask: Hidden identity, deception, social roles, protection
symbols.sword: Truth, justice, conflict, cutting through problems, power
symbols.crown: Authority, achievement, higher self, ego, recognition
symbols.car: Life direction, control, personal drive, status, body
symbols.train: Life's journey on a fixed path, destiny, collective journey
symbols.airplane: Higher perspective, ambition, rapid progress, transcendence
symbols.ice: Frozen emotions, clarity, preservation, emotional coldness
symbols.gold: Value, wisdom, achievement, spiritual truth, sun energy
symbols.silver: Intuition, reflection, moon energy, feminine wisdom
symbols.labyrinth: Complex problem, inner journey, confusion, discovery
symbols.tower: Ambition, isolation, higher perspective, ego, achievement
symbols.temple: Sacred self, spiritual center, devotion, inner sanctum
symbols.hospital: Healing needed, vulnerability, care, health concerns
symbols.library: Accumulated knowledge, memory, wisdom, life records
symbols.market: Choices, social exchange, value, abundance, chaos
symbols.river crossing: Major life transition, leaving old behind, courage
symbols.rainbow: Hope after difficulty, bridge between worlds, promise
symbols.volcano: Suppressed emotions erupting, power, sudden change
symbols.compass: Direction, guidance, decision-making, finding one's way
symbols.map: Life plan, seeking direction, exploration, overview
symbols.treasure: Hidden potential, self-discovery, reward, inner riches
symbols.dancing: Joy, expression, rhythm of life, harmony, celebration
symbols.swimming: Navigating emotions, immersion in subconscious, effort
symbols.running: Pursuit, escape, urgency, drive, avoiding something
symbols.childhood home: Past self, nostalgia, foundational experiences, security
symbols.stranger: Unknown aspect of self, new possibilities, the shadow
symbols.teacher: Inner wisdom, guidance, authority, learning needed
symbols.child self: Inner child, innocence, playfulness, unhealed wounds
symbols.phone: Communication desire, connection, messages from subconscious
symbols.music: Harmony, emotion, spiritual connection, rhythm of life
symbols.cage: Restriction, protection, captivity, safety vs freedom
symbols.rope: Connection, binding, lifeline, restriction, climbing aid
